notes: Desktop/compact form factor (106.6×106.2×25 mm); not rack-mountable. Also includes integrated 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac Wi-Fi (internal; not a physical connector port). USB-A port speed grade omitted — official spec page lists USB Type-A but does not state USB version; KB article references USB 3.0 for the Ultra Encode family but does not confirm this specific model. HDMI version confirmed as 1.4a on tech-specs page. Power is DC barrel from an included 5V adapter (no IEC inlet on the unit itself).

ports.name: LINE IN
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo line-level audio input; 48 kHz 16-bit up to 8-channel

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB Type-A host port; used for USB storage (recording) and USB modem; exact USB version (2.0 vs 3.0) not explicitly stated on spec page

ports.name: DC In
ports.note: DC 5V/3A; supplied via external AC adapter included in box; max power consumption ~8.62W
